  "claims": [
    "The California Latino Legislative Caucus toured migrant shelters on both sides of the U.S./Mexico border.",
    "Assemblywoman Blanca Rubio stated that the conditions witnessed at the border indicate a systematic corrosion of human compassion and decency spurred on by the Trump Administration.",
    "Assemblywoman Rubio expressed that it is heart-breaking to witness young children treated poorly and living in dire conditions.",
    "The California Latino Caucus pledges to work with the new Governor and Attorney General to develop a permanent plan to address the migrant refugee crisis.",
